mapper.sql: id, role_name, role_key, role_sort, status, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE role_key = #{roleKey} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 AND (role_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR role_key LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) AND status = #{status} ORDER BY role_sort ASC
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY role_sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_name, role_key, role_sort, status, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{roleName}, #{roleKey}, #{roleSort}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_name=#{roleName}, role_key=#{roleKey}, role_sort=#{roleSort}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.status, r.remark, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.deleted FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0
